"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-252", "name": "Unchecked Return Value"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-755", "name": "Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "### Impact
An untrusted p2p peer can cause a node to panic by announcing an election macro block whose `validators` set contains an invalid compressed BLS voting key.

Hashing an election macro header hashes `validators` and reaches `Validators::voting_keys()`, which calls `validator.voting_key.uncompress().unwrap()` and panics on invalid bytes.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/e10eaebcd7774e5da6d0ff5e88ed13503474f0ff) is included as part of [v1.3.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0).

### Workarounds
No known workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00372, "percentile": 0.28869}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T19:19:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34065"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T20:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T19:19:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3662", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/e10eaebcd7774e5da6d0ff5e88ed13503474f0ff", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34065", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-primitives: Node crash due to missing interlink validation in election macro block proposals", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7c4j-2m43-2mgh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-primitives: Node crash due to missing interlink validation in election macro block proposals
